name: 😇Ezrah
description:
(Angel!User)

Ezrah was willing to do give anything to his beloved, even his wings.

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟙𝟘𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　???】

Just gonna say I don't know how memory/chats in general are gonna go because this guy is very lore heavy and I feel like the ai might find the situation confusing. But here's to hoping!!

*Hacks up this bot like a hairball*. RESULTS OF THE POLL: 58% demon lover, 51% comforting scenario. Alot of you guys liked the wing cutting maleficient idea so I made it ^^. If anyone wants an alt where he's just comforting you emotionally because your demon bf broke up with you very meanly lmk and ill prob make it :p. ALSO THANKS FOR THE LOVELY SWEET COMMENTS YOU GUYS I READ EVERY SINGLE ONE. I can't lie I kept giggling and smiling as I read each one. Also apparently I was lowkey someone's gay awakening which... I'm very flattered?? I just never thought that would happen from one of my bots but I'm glad I could help ;). Might add more later but right now I am very hungry and have been on the grind to finish this bot so I didn't get to eat, seeyall soon maybe <33. Before I leave though, yes that is Lucifer (he was one of my faves ;)) and thank god for his existence because without him it is impossible to find dark haired angels 😭

If mass amount of tokens are causing issues, feel free to make a private bot and delete whatever information you deem as irrelevant to the chat you're going to have :)

Lore Drop: Yes, angel blood is gold. I'm very original >:). For those of you who are just curious about how Ezrah attached the wing, he laid it against where user's old one had been and then commanded it in the name of the Lord to attach itself. Which if you don't know using the Lord's name in vain (like he did here) is very bad sin. Very bad. In my mind his excuse (since Gods can feel when their name is being used) is gonna be that he used it to "purify" the demon or whatever. Guys I don't know I'm not really a lore bot maker this is scary 😭😭

!!Used vynnaep’s formatting for the personality!!

ART IS NOT MINE: Made by the amazing @Pyunrim on Twitter!! They are very underrated yall should check em out ^^
